nodes.name: PySpark
nodes.description: This node runs any given PySpark code. The input dataframe is passed into the function myfn as a parameter.

fields.title: PySpark
fields.description: PySpark code to be run. Input dataframe : "inDF", SparkContext : "sc", SQLContext : "sqlContext",  Output/Result dataframe should be registered as a temporary table - df.registerTempTable("outDF")

fields.title: Column Names
fields.description: New Output Columns of the SQL

nodes.name: Print N Rows
nodes.description: Prints the specified number of records in the DataFrame. It is useful for seeing intermediate output

fields.title: Output Storage Level

fields.title: Num Rows to Print
fields.description: Number of rows to be printed

fields.description: Select the columns to display, or leave blank to show all columns

fields.name: enableInExecution
fields.title: Enable in Execution
fields.description: If it's enabled, during the execution data is displayed.
